name: Multifunctional Hybrids
description: Combining multiple benefits into one solution. Reducing steps, effort, and complexity.
angle: step reduction, multi-benefit, low effort, smart efficiency
benefit_emphasis: fewer steps, more outcomes, time saved
rtb_logic: one mechanism credibly delivering several effects at once

name: Multisensory Wellbeing
description: Enhancing emotional wellbeing through sensory experiences and rituals.
angle: sensory comfort, emotional regulation, stress reduction, rituals, feel-better experience
benefit_emphasis: how it feels, not just what it does
rtb_logic: ingredients or formats that create the sensory effect (scent, warmth, texture)

name: Advanced Health
description: Treating hair as a health condition with scientific, clinical credibility.
angle: condition management, clinical credibility, efficacy, diagnosis/intervention logic
benefit_emphasis: measurable improvement of a defined condition
rtb_logic: clinical data, mechanism of action, dermatologist/lab credibility

name: Inside-out Beauty
description: Supporting beauty through internal and biological processes.
angle: life phase, biology-informed support, ingestibles, prevention/maintenance
benefit_emphasis: beauty as an outcome of internal health over time

name: Next Level Personalization
description: Adaptive, predictive and personalized solutions tailored to individual needs.
angle: adaptive systems, predictive personalization, context-aware routines
benefit_emphasis: made for me, adjusts to my context
rtb_logic: diagnostics, data, adaptive systems that read and respond to the individual
